column2: 56,Spatial,Punjabi,Native,ਲਾਇਬ੍ਰੇਰੀ ਦੇ 500 ਮੀਟਰ ਦੇ ਅੰਦਰ ਇੱਕ ਕੈਫੇ ਲੱਭੋ।,Find a cafe within 500 meters of the library.,1.0209994316101074,extreme,Find a cafe within 500 meters of the library.,✅ PASS,True,1.0,True,1.0,True,True,True,True,True,True,61,61,[],[],SELECT target.geometry, target.name, target.amenity, ref.geometry AS ref_geom, ref.name AS ref_name FROM campus_places target JOIN campus_places ref ON ST_DWithin(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography, 500) WHERE target.name IS NOT NULL AND target.name != 'nan' AND target.amenity ILIKE '%cafe%' AND ref.amenity ILIKE '%library%' ORDER BY target.name ASC LIMIT 5
